specs.title: cp-000: Slash command Table inserts a 3 x 3 table
cp-001: Slash command Table inserts the table with withHeaderRow true
cp-002: Slash command Table runs a requestAnimationFrame post-pass to add class academic
cp-003: Slash command Image description is Insert an image
cp-004: Slash command Image creates a hidden file input rather than opening a URL prompt
cp-005: Slash command Image accepts image files only
cp-006: Cancelling the slash image file picker removes the temporary input and inserts n
cp-007: Selecting an image reads the file through FileReaderreadAsDataURL
cp-008: Slash image insertion inserts a base64 image into the editor
cp-009: Slash command Abstract inserts a heading Abstract
cp-010: Slash command Abstract inserts four following paragraph starters Background Meth
cp-011: Slash command Abstract bolds each structured heading label inside the inserted p
cp-012: Slash command Figure Caption auto-counts existing Figure N paragraphs before ins
cp-013: Slash command Figure Caption inserts bold prefix Figure n
cp-014: Slash command Figure Caption default trailing text is Caption text here
cp-015: Slash command Table Caption auto-counts existing Table N paragraphs before inser
cp-016: Slash command Table Caption inserts bold prefix Table n
cp-017: Slash command Table Caption default trailing text is Caption text here
cp-018: Slash command Footnote opens promptEnter footnote text
cp-019: Cancelling the footnote prompt inserts no footnote node
cp-020: Slash command Cite description is Insert a citation from your library
cp-021: Slash command Cite shortcut label is CmdShiftC
cp-022: Slash command Cite opens the citation dialog via the shared scholarsynceditor-ac
cp-023: Slash command Continue Writing dispatches scholarsyncai-action with action conti
cp-024: Slash command Continue Writing sends the full editor plain text as detailcontext
cp-025: Slash command Outline Section dispatches scholarsyncai-action with action outlin
cp-026: Slash command Check Guidelines dispatches scholarsyncai-action with action check
cp-027: Slash command Ask AI dispatches scholarsyncai-action with action ask and no inse
cp-028: Slash command Word Count dispatches scholarsynceditor-action with action show-wo
cp-029: Executing a slash command always deletes the typed slash trigger range before ru
cp-030: Academic keyboard shortcut Mod-Shift-X toggles strikethrough
cp-031: Academic keyboard shortcut Mod-Shift-H toggles highlight
cp-032: Academic keyboard shortcut Mod-Shift-K opens windowpromptEnter URL
cp-033: Leaving the keyboard-shortcut link prompt empty does not set a link
cp-034: Academic keyboard shortcut Mod-Shift- toggles superscript
